string 2:
I've grown stronger... but am I strong enough? Big Bro isn't
here with me anymore...
Oh, it's you... *sigh*
{next}You seem kind of down.
{next}Got a case of burnout syndrome?
{end}I'll... come back another time.

Of course I am. I mean, I did have to take down 
my big brother...

Burnout what? Oh, I get it. Maybe I do.
Now that I'm champion, I've lost my purpose.

You're going to leave me alone? That's nice of you...
Let's catch up later...

I talked all big about protecting the world, but
who am I kidding? What can I protect?

...What do humans do at times like this, when they
need to get out of their own heads?
{next}Well... we might try watching a movie.
{next}Let me look that up for you.
{next}Escape from reality.
A movie? What's a movie?

So, I just read from your device? "10 Ways to Find
Peace of Mind." No. 1 is watch a movie.

Oh, like read a book or something? You know,
I've heard of things called "movies," too.

Hey, tell me about these "movies." You got any
friends who know about them?

I heard someone wants to watch movies! Hee hee.
Don't worry. Hiroko's gotcha covered!

Now I'm starting to get self-conscious... But okay.
Ease me into this, all right?

We'll start with "Yesterday's George!" An action classic
even a total noob can enjoy!
A pro boxer who nearly killed his opponent... That's basically me.

But George bounced back from the incident. Which means...
maybe I can, too!

Maybe it's time I got back to the underground arena. I can't
run from this forever!

Hell, yeah! Now, here's a place where I can fight my heart
out! Help me train a bit!
Hey, nice work back there! You come to check up on me?
{next}You looked good out there!
{next}Think those moves would work in a real fight?
{next}Actually, I just wanted to fight.

Right? I was thinking the same thing. I was moving pretty
good out there, but...

Haha. Ouch... But you're right. In a real fight, the other
side is out for blood.

Haha. You're something else. Just the type of person we need
to save the world.

*sigh* It's still no good. What happened with my brother has
me scared of my full strength.

If I can't even face YOU all out, I'm doomed. And now all
this worrying's got me hungry!
{next}It's like your body's telling you to live.
{next}I know some places with good food.
{next}No work, no food.
...Good point. I need to live.
Really? Talking about it made me extra hungry.

Urk... But, hey, I did work a little, so that must mean I
deserve at least a snack, right?

Yeah, we could eat nearby. Okay, I'll head to Subroad. Show
me around once you arrive!

Good. You're here. Everyone's staring at me. I've never been
around so many humans before!

And just look at all these shops! They all look so good...
What should I get first?
{next}Some fluffy omelet rice.
{next}A two-pound steak.
{next}Iced sweet potatoes.

What's that?! Omelet rice is white? Like meringue? Never
heard of it, but sounds good!

Sounds huge! Perfect for a starving Digimon like me! All
right, I'm gonna stuff myself!

So they're baked but chilled? In a pot? You humans sure come
up with some weird stuff...

Whew, I can't eat another bite! Not after having everything
you recommended!

The omelet rice was fluffy, the steak was meaty and the
potatoes were sticky and sweet!
{next}You really chowed down.
{next}Nothing makes you happy like a full stomach.
{next}Here's the bill.

Haha. Come to think of it, I've been feeling so down I
haven't eaten much lately.

You can say that again. You know, maybe I was feeling out of
sorts because I was hungry.
Huh?! You mean I have to pay?!
...Oh, that was a joke. You almost had me!

I haven't felt this good in ages! Reminds me of something
Big Bro said.

"If ya wanna protect Iliad, you gotta eat a lot of food so
ya grow up big and strong."

Hey, meet me at the Paradise Colosseum. I'll fight you
all-out as prep for the big battle.
{next}You sound fully recovered.
{next}Go easy on me.
{next}In an eating competition?

You bet I am! And I'm going to make you regret ever snapping
me out of my funk!
Hey, don't play yourself down. You're plenty strong.

You know, that's not a bad idea. Maybe I'll try streaming it
after the big fight.

Here. Take this. My way of returning the favor for getting
me back on track.

Time to balance out all that eating with some practice! See
you at the Paradise Colosseum!

I'd fight in the Underground Arena, too. And even that
card game's good training!
Oh, yeah! I'm back and raring to go!
